zh.lifeSummary: 當John Brooksby, Esquire於1336年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷時，他的父親Robert de Brokesby21歲，母親Mrs. Robert de Brokesby21歲。他於1366年與Agnes Frisby在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1400年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Brooksby, Esquire于1336年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷时，他的父亲Robert de Brokesby21岁，母亲Mrs. Robert de Brokesby21岁。他于1366年与Agnes Frisby在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾梅爾敦 莫布雷结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1400年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brooksby,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Brooksby in Leicestershire.

nameMeanings.name: Esquire
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name, occupational name, or a nickname from Middle English squyer, squer, skier, sker, northern Middle English swire (Old French escuyer, escuier) ‘shield bearer, esquire, personal attendant to a knight; landowner below the rank of knight; young man of gentle birth; household attendant, retainer, page, messenger’. Many early bearers of this name were of modest means and cannot have been members of the gentry; in such cases the name may have been used hyperbolically for a low-ranking servant or as a nickname. By the 17th century, the term denoted any member of the landed gentry, but this is unlikely to have influenced the development of the surname.

variants.name: Swire
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Squire  , from a northern form of the word.

variants.name: Quire
meanings: Scottish or Irish: shortened form of   McQuire   (see   McGuire  ).

variants.name: Squires
meanings: English: variant of Squire , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Scuderi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmelo, Salvatore, Angelo, Carlo, Gaetano, Vito, Antonio, Dante, Mario, Rocco, Rosario, Antonino, Biaggio, Eduardo, Ermelinda, Margarita.

Italian (Sicily): status name equivalent to Squire , from scudiero, scutiero, dialect scuteri ‘shieldbearer’ (from medieval Latin scutarius, an agent derivative of scutum ‘shield’). In Byzantium, the Greek word skoutarios denoted a member of the imperial guard.

variants.name: Square
meanings: English (Devon) and Scottish (Lanarkshire): variant of   Squire  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Brooksby, Esquire was born in 1336, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, his father, Robert de Brokesby, was 21 and his mother, Mrs. Robert de Brokesby, was 21. He married Agnes Frisby in 1366, in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1400, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Brooksby, Esquire est né en 1336, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Brokesby, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Robert de Brokesby, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Frisby en 1366, à Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1400, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Brooksby, Esquire 1336 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Brokesby 21 und seine Mutter Mrs. Robert de Brokesby 21. Er hat 1366 in Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Frisby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1400 im Alter von 64 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Brooksby, Esquire è nato il nel 1336 nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Brokesby, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Robert de Brokesby, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Frisby nel 1366, nel Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1400, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 64 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: John Brooksby, Esquire(이)가 1336년 영국 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Brokesby(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Robert de Brokesby(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1366년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 멜턴 모우브라이에서 Agnes Frisby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1400년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Agnes Frisby em 1366, em Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Brooksby, Esquire родился в 1336 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Brokesby было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Robert de Brokesby, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Frisby в 1366 г. в местности мелтон мавбрэи, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1400 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 64 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Brooksby, Esquire nació en 1336, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Brokesby, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Mrs. Robert de Brokesby, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Agnes Frisby en 1366, en Melton Mowbray, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1400, en su pueblo, a la edad de 64 años.
